arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the IAM policy.

attachment_count.description: The number of entities (users, groups, roles) that the policy is attached to.

description.description: A brief explanation or summary of the IAM policy.

id.description: The unique identifier of the IAM policy.

name.description: The name of the IAM policy.

path.description: The path to the IAM policy in AWS.

policy.description: The JSON formatted content of the IAM policy.

policy_id.description: The unique policy identifier for the IAM policy.

tags.description: A map of key-value pairs assigned as tags to the IAM policy.
